name: Ezreal
title: The Prodigal Explorer
shortBio:
- Essence Flux (W) passes through all units dealing damage to enemies and granting allies attack speed
- Trueshot Barrage (R) deals less damage per enemy hit

skins.name: Frosted Ezreal

chromas.name: Frosted Ezreal (Paragon)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as an exclusive reward for players who obtained the 2025 Hall of Legends Signature Immortalized Legend Edition Collection honoring Uzi.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as an exclusive reward for players who obtained the 2025 Hall of Legends Signature Immortalized Legend Edition Collection honoring Uzi.

skins.description: Ezreal occasionally finds himself in the Freljord, searching for such-and-such ancient artifact. But braving sub-zero temperatures, terrifying ice beasts, and angry Freljordian tribes is a tall order, even for him—that's why he goes in disguise. He's practically a different person!

skins.name: Pulsefire Ezreal
skins.description: Temporal fugitive and time-hopping explorer extraordinaire, Ezreal leaps across disparate realities searching for interesting technology to acquire. He is responsible for countless paradoxes and is currently wanted by the dystopian Remembrancers, who hunt him relentlessly.

skins.name: HEARTSTEEL Ezreal

chromas.name: HEARTSTEEL Ezreal (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2023.

chromas.name: HEARTSTEEL Ezreal (Rockstar)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the Worlds 2023 event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the Worlds 2023 event.

skins.description: After a manufactured one-hit wonder launched Ezreal into the spotlight, only for him to fall out of it again when the album got panned, Ezreal decided it was time he took some creative control back. Now, having left his old label and lending what star power he has to HEARTSTEEL, Ezreal has found musicians and friends he's ready to make a comeback with.

skins.name: Heavenscale Ezreal

chromas.name: Heavenscale Ezreal (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2024.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2024.

chromas.name: Heavenscale Ezreal (Auspicious)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2024 Heavenscale event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2024 Heavenscale event.

chromas.name: Heavenscale Ezreal (Lustrous)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2024 Heavenscale event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the 2024 Heavenscale event.

skins.description: Wherever chaos is sown, dragons across the kingdom know to listen for Ezreal's mischievous laughter. His japes are harmless, but don't let that merry spirit fool you: he is a shrewd royal scout alongside Kai'Sa who has braved many adventures between bouts of pranking. Dressing up like a human to go party? Now that sounds like his idea of a good time.

skins.name: Prestige Heavenscale Ezreal
skins.description: Ezreal's gilded gala garb is fit for royalty. Adorned in hand-crafted scales and crystal horns, this tastemaker came to the party with a mission: ring in the New Year not just with a bang, but a roar.

skins.name: Classic Ezreal
skins.description: Named after game designer Colt "Ezreal" Hallam, the Prodigal Explorer came to the Rift on March 16, 2010—as the subject of the first (formal) Champion Spotlight video. Equipped with an attack-speed boosting W, armed with items fit for the jungle, and crowned with a haircut you can count the polygons of, a classic like this belongs in a museum!

passive.name: Rising Spell Force
passive.description: Ezreal gains increasing Attack Speed each time he successfully hits a spell, stacking up to 5 times.

spells.name: Mystic Shot
spells.description: Ezreal fires a damaging bolt of energy which reduces all of his cooldowns slightly if it strikes an enemy unit.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Ezreal fires a bolt of energy, dealing @Damage@ physical damage (applies on-hit effects).

Ezreal's cooldowns are reduced by 1 second if Mystic Shot hits a target.
@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Essence Flux
spells.description: Ezreal fires a fluctuating wave of energy, decreasing the Attack Speed and dealing magic damage to enemy champions, while healing and increasing the Attack Speed of allied champions.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Ezreal fires a wave of energy that damages all enemy champions it passes through for @Damage@ magic damage and reducing their Attack Speed by @AttackSpeed@% for 5 seconds.

Allied champions hit by the wave restore @TotalHeal@ Health and have their Attack Speed increased by @AttackSpeed@% for 5 seconds.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Arcane Shift
spells.description: Ezreal teleports to a target nearby location and fires a homing bolt which strikes the nearest enemy unit.
spells.dynamicDescription: Ezreal teleports to a target nearby location and fires a homing bolt at the nearest enemy unit, dealing <magicDamage>@Damage@ magic damage</magicDamage>.@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Trueshot Barrage
spells.description: Ezreal channels for 1 second to fire a powerful barrage of energy missiles which do massive damage to each unit they pass through (deals 10% less damage to each unit it passes through).
spells.dynamicDescription: Ezreal channels for 1 second to fire a barrage of missiles dealing <magicDamage>@Damage@ magic damage</magicDamage> to each unit it passes through. However, it deals @DamageReductionPerHit*100@% less damage for each unit it hits (minimum @MinimumDamagePercent*100@%)@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@
